LanguageData.RealityWeaver.label: Reality Weaver
LanguageData.RealityWeaver.description: An archotech construction device that instantly materializes building blueprints and construction frames within a designated area. It consumes power proportional to the total work required to build each structure (1 Wd per 1 work unit). Energy is drained from Matter-Energy Converter batteries first, then Omni Crafter infinite batteries, and finally standard batteries. Has zero performance impact when unpowered or disabled.
